design_philosophy: Authority, Clarity, Truth. Dense data presentation with a 'Technical Control Room' aesthetic. Functional beauty with high-contrast structural elements and a single, authoritative accent color.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Dense data presentation with visible grid lines. Sharp edges.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen border-r border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 flex flex-col
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol - Control Room Grid for dashboards. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Every pixel utilized.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Minimal. Use 1px borders instead of soft shadows to separate content. For hover states: slight lift (-translate-y-px) and shadow-sm.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 hover:text-white. Secondary: bg-white border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50.
components.cards: border border-slate-200 bg-white p-5 rounded-sm. No shadow. Explicit text colors for all states.
components.tables: Dense. text-sm. border-b border-slate-200 on rows. Header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wide bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 py-3 px-4.
components.inputs: h-9 border-slate-300 rounded-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600/20 focus:border-blue-600 text-sm.
components.charts: Shadcn charts (Recharts). Minimal axes, no grid lines. Tooltips with sharp edges and 1px border. Use Primary Accent (#0047AB) as main chart color.
components.toast: Sonner. Bottom-right. Sharp edges, border border-slate-200.
components.modals: Backdrop bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-sm. Modal surface white, sharp edges, p-6, border border-slate-200.

images_and_icons.logo_concept: Phosphor Package Icon + 'StokTakip' text in Work Sans Bold (Tracking-tight).

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-dashboard-link', data-testid='sales-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use generic purple or teal gradients. Strictly adhere to the Light Theme and the primary accent color (#0047AB).
Implement the 8 specified menu items in the sidebar using Turkish labels.
Dashboard MUST include these KPI cards: 'Toplam Ürün Sayısı', 'Toplam Stok Değeri', 'Bugünkü Satış', 'Aylık Satış'.
Dashboard MUST include alert sections for 'Minimum Stok Altındaki Ürünler' and 'Raf Ömrü Yaklaşan Ürünler'.
Dashboard MUST include 'En Çok Satan 5 Ürün' list and 'Son Üretim/Satış Hareketleri' feed.
In the Reports section, implement: Line chart (Satış trendi), Bar chart (Ürün bazlı satış, Üretim), Pie chart (Kategori dağılımı).
Ensure all tables support search, filter, sort, date range filtering, and Export to CSV/Excel functionality.
The Günlük Satış (Daily Sales) page must function like a POS (multi-product cart, customer select, payment status).
Implement role-based views if requested, but at minimum ensure the UI supports Admin, Personel, and Sadece-Rapor modes structurally.
Use Shadcn UI components extensively, overriding their default border-radius to `rounded-sm` or `rounded-none` to match the Technical Grid Borders aesthetic.
